title: Pumpkins 😐
description:
Bored of having the usual carved or shiny pumpkins?
Add more fun to the Minecraft World with these special pumpkins!
body:
A simple texturepack that change... carved pumpkins? 😯

🤔 What's this texturepack?

It's a texturepack that changes the carved pumpkins and glowing pumpkins so they don't look scary, but instead look friendly.
The texture pack is still in beta, but it is stable.

✅ Features:

  • Change the name of Jack O'Lantern Pumpkin to Glow Pumpkins (Currently only in Spanish)
  • Change in the appearance of the Carved Pumpkin.
  • Change the appearance of the Glow Pumpkin
  • The vision with the carved pumpkin is totally clear (it's not available in the beta version at the moment).
